title: Best Games Educational Institution – TIGA 2025
summary: The university has been named Best Educational Institution at the TIGA Games Industry Awards 2025, for the second year in a row, recognising our outstanding games education.

title: New Student Village Opens September 2026
summary: Brand new stylish, sustainable accommodation is coming to campus with the Student Village and Village Hub, bringing modern living spaces right to the University Quarter.

title: Top 25 for Computer Science Student Satisfaction
summary: The Department of Computing has been ranked in the top 25 for student satisfaction in Computer Science by the Complete University Guide 2024.

title: Cyber Security Student Nominated for Youth Award
summary: Final year BSc Cyber Security student Binita has been nominated for the Inspirational Youth Awards 2026 for inspiring young people to pursue STEAM careers.

title: Computing Hackathon 2026 Registration Open
summary: The annual 24-hour hackathon is back. Teams of up to 4 can register now. Prizes include internship opportunities with our industry partners Microsoft, Cisco and IBM.
